title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.412 - Inventory to be maintained on ground and surface water uses, quantity and users
text:
640.412.  Inventory to be maintained on ground and surface water uses, quantity and users. — The department shall inventory:
  (1)  Existing surface water and groundwater uses;
  (2)  The quantity of surface water and groundwater available for uses in the future; and
  (3)  Water extraction and use patterns, including regulated and unregulated users.
(L. 1989 S.B. 112, et al. § 5)
